title: My wife’s 2011 Ford Fiesta was totaled. Should we accept a $2,000 insurance settlement or give up the car for $2,700?
summary: A couple faces a decision after their 2011 Ford Fiesta is totaled: accept a $2,000 insurance settlement or surrender the car for $2,700 in salvage value. With significant damage including a bent hood, cracked radiator, and destroyed bumper, the choice hinges on which option provides better financial recovery.
content: “The hood is bent, the radiator is cracked, and the front bumper is destroyed.”

zh.title: 我妻子的2011年福特嘉年华被全损。我们应该接受2000美元的保险赔偿还是放弃这辆车换取2700美元的废品价值？
zh.summary: 一对夫妇在他们的2011年福特嘉年华全损后面临一个决定：接受2000美元的保险赔偿或将车辆交出以换取2700美元的废品价值。由于包括引擎盖弯曲、散热器破裂和保险杠损毁等重大损伤，选择取决于哪个选项能提供更好的经济回报。

title: Geopolitical shock exposes SK Hynix leverage after hot ADR debut
summary: SK Hynix shares dropped 15% in Seoul trading just one day after a successful U.S. depositary receipt listing, exposing the South Korean chipmaker's vulnerability to geopolitical shocks. The rapid decline underscores the company's operational leverage and exposure to regional tensions.
content: Just one trading session after a highly successful U.S. listing for its depositary receipts, local shares in South Korean chip maker SK Hynix plummeted 15% on the domestic exchange in Seoul.

zh.title: 地缘政治冲击在SK海力士火爆美国存托凭证首次亮相后暴露其杠杆风险
zh.summary: SK海力士股票在成功美国存托凭证上市仅一天后在首尔交易中下跌15%，暴露了这家韩国芯片制造商对地缘政治冲击的脆弱性。这次迅速下滑强调了该公司的经营杠杆和对地区紧张局势的敞口。

title: TSMC just reported a record month for revenue ahead of critical earnings report on Thursday
summary: Taiwan's TSMC reported a record June revenue of $13.2 billion, representing a 67% increase month-over-month. The strong results set expectations high for the company's upcoming second-quarter earnings announcement.
content: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Corp. said net revenue increased by 67% in June to $13.2 billion

zh.title: 台积电报告了创纪录的月度收入，为关键的周四财报做准备
zh.summary: 台湾台积电报告6月创纪录的收入达132亿美元，环比增长67%。这些强劲的业绩为公司即将发布的第二季度财报奠定了高期望。

title: U.S. and Iran exchange strikes as Strait of Hormuz standoff escalates
summary: The U.S. military conducted fresh strikes against Iranian forces, prompting Iran to retaliate with attacks on American military bases across the Gulf region. The escalating confrontation raises concerns about regional stability and shipping security in a critical waterway.
content: Iran responded to a fresh wave of strikes by U.S. forces by launching an attack on American military bases in several Gulf states.

zh.title: 美伊交换打击，霍尔木兹海峡对峙升级
zh.summary: 美军对伊朗力量进行了新的打击，促使伊朗对海湾地区的美军基地进行报复性攻击。这场不断升级的对抗引发了人们对地区稳定性和这一关键水道航运安全的担忧。

title: Tennis star Jessica Pegula is a billionaire heiress — here’s a look at her family’s vast property portfolio
summary: Tennis champion Jessica Pegula comes from the billionaire Pegula family, worth an estimated $9.3 billion, which owns the Buffalo Bills among other sports franchises and extensive real estate holdings. The article explores her family's impressive portfolio of assets and properties.
content: In addition to the Buffalo Bills, the Pegula family—which is worth an estimated $9.3 billion—also owns two other teams and an impressive collection of real estate.

zh.title: 网球明星杰西卡·佩古拉是亿万富翁继承人——看看她家族庞大的房产组合
zh.summary: 网球冠军杰西卡·佩古拉来自身家估计为93亿美元的亿万富翁佩古拉家族，该家族拥有水牛城比尔队等多个体育特许权和大量房地产。这篇文章探讨了她家族印象深刻的资产和房产组合。

title: Helen Mirren relists her longtime Hollywood Hills estate for $13 million after big renovation
summary: Acclaimed actress Helen Mirren is relisting her long-owned Hollywood Hills home for $13 million following a major renovation. The new asking price represents a significant discount from its previous listing, offering potential buyers the opportunity to acquire a piece of the star's California real estate.
content: Acclaimed actress Helen Mirren is giving buyers another chance to own a piece of her own illustrious Hollywood history—this time with a multimillion-dollar discount.

zh.title: 海伦·米伦大翻新后以1300万美元重新上市她的好莱坞山庄产业
zh.summary: 备受赞誉的女演员海伦·米伦在进行大翻新后，以1300万美元重新上市她长期拥有的好莱坞山庄。新的要价比之前的挂牌价格有大幅下降，为潜在买家提供了获得这位影星加州房产的机会。

title: There’s good and bad news if you want to copy JPMorgan’s new AI agent that outperforms the 60/40 portfolio
summary: JPMorgan has developed an AI agent capable of outperforming the traditional 60/40 investment portfolio while reducing risk through market and economic data analysis. However, there are both advantages and disadvantages to implementing this strategy for individual investors.
content: JPMorgan says it’s designed an artificial-intelligent agent to evaluate markets and economic data and use it to outperform the standard 60/40 investing model, with less risk to boot.

zh.title: 如果您想复制摩根大通新推出的超越60/40投资组合的人工智能代理，有好消息也有坏消息
zh.summary: 摩根大通开发了一个人工智能代理，能够通过市场和经济数据分析超越传统的60/40投资组合，同时降低风险。然而，对于个人投资者来说，实施这一策略既有优势也有劣势。

title: Europe's Anduril rival Helsing raises $1.8 billion at $18 billion valuation
summary: Helsing, a European defense technology company competing with Anduril, secured $1.8 billion in funding at an $18 billion valuation. Strong investor demand exceeded available allocation, signaling market confidence in the company's growth prospects.
content: Helsing said "investor demand significantly exceeded the available allocation" for its $1.8 billion funding round.

zh.title: 欧洲Anduril竞争对手Helsing以180亿美元估值融资18亿美元
zh.summary: 欧洲国防科技公司Helsing与Anduril竞争，以180亿美元的估值获得了18亿美元的融资。强劲的投资者需求超过了可用配额，表明市场对该公司增长前景充满信心。

title: TSMC, the world's largest contract chipmaker, reports 68% surge in June revenue
summary: TSMC, the world's leading contract chipmaker, reported a 68% surge in June revenue ahead of formal quarterly results. The strong performance reflects robust global demand for semiconductor manufacturing capacity.
content: Ahead of its second-quarter earnings, TSMC reported its June and first-half revenue for 2026.

zh.title: 全球最大代工芯片制造商台积电报告6月收入增长68%
zh.summary: 全球领先的代工芯片制造商台积电报告6月收入增长68%，先于正式季度结果。强劲的业绩反映了全球对半导体代工产能的强劲需求。

title: The SpaceX IPO made history. One month on has it lost momentum?
summary: One month after SpaceX's historic initial public offering, the company's stock performance raises questions about whether its momentum has stalled. The analysis examines how the market is valuing the company's current revenue streams and growth prospects.
content: A month on from the firm's stock market debut, the reality of how SpaceX currently makes money has seemed to come into clearer focus.

zh.title: SpaceX IPO创造历史。一个月后它失去了动力吗？
zh.summary: 在SpaceX具有历史意义的首次公开募股一个月后，该公司的股票表现引发了关于其势头是否已停滞的疑问。该分析研究了市场如何估值该公司当前的收入流和增长前景。

title: Demand for baby bank growing faster than donations
summary: A baby clothing and formula milk charity reports growing demand that exceeds donation levels, distributing 36,400 clothing items and 536 tubs of formula in 2025. The imbalance suggests increasing economic pressure on families with young children.
content: The charity says it gave out 36,400 items of child clothing and 536 tubs of formula milk in 2025.

zh.title: 婴儿银行需求增长速度快于捐赠
zh.summary: 一家婴儿服装和配方奶粉慈善机构报告称，需求增长超过了捐赠水平，在2025年分发了36,400件衣服和536罐配方奶粉。这种不平衡表明对有幼儿家庭的经济压力在增加。

title: US and Iran trade fire as tensions rise over Strait of Hormuz
summary: The U.S. military conducted fresh attacks, and Iran responded by striking American military bases in Kuwait, Jordan, and Bahrain within hours. The rapid escalation heightens concerns about regional destabilization and threatens critical shipping lanes in the Strait of Hormuz.
content: Within hours of fresh US attacks, Iran said it had struck US military bases in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain.

zh.title: 美国和伊朗交火，霍尔木兹海峡紧张局势升级
zh.summary: 美国军方进行了新的攻击，伊朗在数小时内通过对科威特、约旦和巴林的美国军事基地发动袭击作出回应。这种快速升级加剧了人们对地区不稳定的担忧，并威胁了霍尔木兹海峡的关键航运通道。

title: SK Hynix shares slide 10% in Seoul after stellar Nasdaq debut
summary: SK Hynix's stock fell over 10% in Seoul on Monday following the chipmaker's strong Nasdaq debut. The decline reflects typical post-IPO profit-taking after the initial rally and strong opening performance.
content: SK Hynix Inc. shares tumbled over 10% in Seoul on Monday after the chipmaker's blockbuster Nasdaq debut.

zh.title: SK海力士纳斯达克首日表现抢眼后首尔股价下跌10%
zh.summary: SK海力士在周一纳斯达克首日表现强劲后，其首尔股价下跌超过10%。这反映了首次公开募股初期涨势后的典型获利回吐现象。

title: Stock futures slip after U.S., Iran exchange airstrikes again: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock index futures declined as traders assessed the latest escalation in U.S.-Iran military tensions in the Middle East. The market movement came as investors also prepared for upcoming corporate earnings reports.
content: Traders weighed the latest events in the Middle East and braced for a slew of corporate earnings reports due out later in the week.

zh.title: 美伊再次交换空袭后股指期货下滑：实时更新
zh.summary: 当交易员评估美伊在中东地区最新军事紧张局势升级时，美国股指期货下跌。市场波动同时也反映了投资者为即将公布的企业财报做准备。

title: Oil prices rise, stock futures dip after latest flare-up of strikes between U.S. and Iran
summary: Oil prices increased while U.S. stock-index futures fell following continued tit-for-tat military strikes between the U.S. and Iran around the Strait of Hormuz. The escalation raises concerns about potential disruptions to global energy supplies.
content: Oil prices rose and U.S. stock-index futures slipped on Sunday, after the U.S. and Iran continued their tit-for-tat attacks around the Strait of Hormuz over the weekend.

zh.title: 美伊最新冲突后油价上升，股指期货下跌
zh.summary: 在美国和伊朗围绕霍尔木兹海峡继续进行来回空袭后，油价上升，美国股指期货下跌。这一升级引发了对全球能源供应可能中断的担忧。

title: McConnell provides health update after long unexplained absence; says he suffered fall, pneumonia
summary: Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell disclosed he suffered a fall and pneumonia during his recent unexplained absence. The disclosure provides clarity after an extended period without public appearances from the longest-serving party leader in Senate history.
content: McConnell is the longest-serving party leader in Senate history.

zh.title: 麦康奈尔在长期神秘缺席后提供健康更新；称他遭受跌倒和肺炎
zh.summary: 参议院少数党领袖米奇·麦康奈尔披露他在最近的神秘缺席期间遭受跌倒和肺炎。这一披露在美国参议院历史上任职时间最长的党派领袖长期没有公开露面后提供了澄清。

title: ‘Trump accounts’ are great — if you’re already rich
summary: Trump-branded financial accounts offer substantial benefits primarily for high-net-worth individuals, while providing limited value for most other people. The article examines why these investment vehicles may exacerbate wealth inequality rather than democratize financial opportunity.
content: They’re a poor deal for most other people.

zh.title: "特朗普账户"很不错——前提是你已经很富有
zh.summary: 特朗普品牌的金融账户主要为高净值个人提供了实质性的好处,而对大多数其他人的价值有限。该文章研究了为什么这些投资工具可能会加剧财富不平等,而不是民主化金融机会。

title: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
summary: Pokémon Go reaches its 10th anniversary with millions of players still actively engaged with the mobile game. Scopely executives emphasize the game's enduring appeal lies in its mission to bring people together.
content: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.

zh.title: 《精灵宝可梦GO》10周年，数百万玩家仍在努力"抓住它们"
zh.summary: 《精灵宝可梦GO》迎来10周年纪念，数百万玩家仍在积极参与这款手机游戏。Scopely高管强调该游戏经久不衰的吸引力在于其将人们聚集在一起的使命。
